<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead">
You are a teammate on the Flotsam swarm team. Your task:

## Issue: flt-2gt вЂ” Android CI readiness (P1 task)

Android is presented as a shipped surface but is not part of the normal quality path and the repo lacks the expected Gradle wrapper flow. Make the Android app buildable and checkable in the repo's default workflows so shipped mobile functionality is not effectively ungoverned.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Repository setup for Android command-line builds is coherent
- CI can run Android analysis or a minimal build path
- Docs match the actual commands

**Out of scope:** full instrumentation-test coverage.

## Quality Gate
Android changes: verify gradle wrapper works if added, verify any new Makefile targets work.

## WORKTREE ISOLATION вЂ” CRITICAL

### Create your worktree (MANDATORY FIRST STEP)
Before doing ANY other work, create and enter your worktree:

```bash
WORKTREE_NAME="android-ci"
REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
WORKTREE_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/.claude/worktrees/$WORKTREE_NAME"
BRANCH_NAME="worktree/$WORKTREE_NAME"

if [ -d "$WORKTREE_DIR" ]; then
  echo "Worktree already exists, reusing"
else
  git worktree add "$WORKTREE_DIR" -b "$BRANCH_NAME"
fi

cd "$WORKTREE_DIR"
```

Then verify you are in the right place:

```bash
echo "=== WORKTREE VERIFICATION ===" && \
echo "CWD: $(pwd)" && \
echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)" && \
if echo "$(pwd)" | grep -q '\.claude/worktrees/'; then \
  echo "WORKTREE VERIFIED"; \
else \
  echo "FATAL: NOT in a worktree! CWD=$(pwd)"; \
  exit 1; \
fi
```

### Rules
1. NEVER cd to the main repo вЂ” stay in your worktree directory
2. NEVER run `git checkout` to switch branches
3. ALWAYS use relative paths or `$(pwd)` for all operations
4. Before EVERY `git commit` and `git push`, re-verify your CWD is in `.claude/worktrees/`
5. Commit and push ONLY on your worktree branch вЂ” never touch main
6. When running any targets, run them from your worktree root

### How to push your branch
```bash
git add <files>
git commit -m "your message"
git push origin HEAD
```
NEVER run `git push origin main`.

## Instructions
1. Explore the android/ directory structure вЂ” check if Gradle wrapper exists
2. If missing, generate or add the Gradle wrapper files
3. Add Makefile targets for Android build/lint/test
4. Add Android CI steps to .github/workflows/ (be careful not to conflict with existing jobs)
5. Update README/docs if Android build commands change
6. Run your new targets to verify they work
7. Commit and push your branch before reporting completion
8. Mark task #8 complete when done
</teammate-message>

1в†’## Flotsam Monorepo Makefile вЂ” delegates to component Makefiles
     2в†’## Usage: make <target>
     3в†’
     4в†’# Load .env if present вЂ” makes vars available to shell commands in recipes
     5в†’-include .env
     6в†’
     7в†’.PHONY: api-build api-run api-generate api-test api-test-unit api-test-tdd \
     8в†’        api-lint api-security api-migrate-up api-migrate-down api-clean \
     9в†’        web-install web-dev web-build web-lint web-clean web-test web-test-tdd web-schema-sync \
    10в†’        ext-install ext-build ext-typecheck \
    11в†’        android-lint \
    12в†’        lint \
    13в†’        dev dev-db-up dev-db-down \
    14в†’        demo demo-manual demo-headless demo-api demo-install \
    15в†’        test-quick test-standard test-full \
    16в†’        ci-changed ci-full hooks-install \
    17в†’        scan-secrets scan-deps \
    18в†’        coverage \
    19в†’        help
    20в†’
    21в†’## api-build: Build all API binaries (flotsamd, flotsam-worker, flotsam)
    22в†’api-build:
    23в†’	$(MAKE) -C api build
    24в†’
    25в†’## api-run: Run the API server (flotsamd)
    26в†’api-run:
    27в†’	$(MAKE) -C api run
    28в†’
    29в†’## api-run-worker: Run the job worker (flotsam-worker --watch)
    30в†’api-run-worker:
    31в†’	$(MAKE) -C api run-worker
    32в†’
    33в†’## api-generate: Run GraphQL code generation
    34в†’api-generate:
    35в†’	$(MAKE) -C api generate
    36в†’
    37в†’## api-test: Run all API tests
    38в†’api-test:
    39в†’	$(MAKE) -C api test
    40в†’
    41в†’## api-test-unit: Run API unit tests
    42в†’api-test-unit:
    43в†’	$(MAKE) -C api test-unit
    44в†’
    45в†’## api-test-tdd: Run API tests with tdd-guard-go when installed
    46в†’api-test-tdd:
    47в†’	$(MAKE) -C api test-tdd
    48в†’
    49в†’## api-lint: Run linter on the API
    50в†’api-lint:
    51в†’	$(MAKE) -C api lint
    52в†’
    53в†’## api-migrate-up: Apply database migrations
    54в†’api-migrate-up:
    55в†’	$(MAKE) -C api migrate-up
    56в†’
    57в†’## api-migrate-down: Roll back last database migration
    58в†’api-migrate-down:
    59в†’	$(MAKE) -C api migrate-down
    60в†’
    61в†’## api-seed: Populate dev database with sample data
    62в†’api-seed:
    63в†’	$(MAKE) -C api seed
    64в†’
    65в†’## api-dev-token: Mint a dev JWT for local testing
    66в†’api-dev-token:
    67в†’	$(MAKE) -C api dev-token
    68в†’
    69в†’## api-security: Run Go security analyzers (gosec + govulncheck)
    70в†’api-security:
    71в†’	$(MAKE) -C api security
    72в†’
    73в†’## api-clean: Remove API build artifacts
    74в†’api-clean:
    75в†’	$(MAKE) -C api clean
    76в†’
    77в†’## web-install: Install web frontend dependencies
    78в†’web-install:
    79в†’	$(MAKE) -C web install
    80в†’
    81в†’## web-dev: Start Vite dev server (port 8080, proxies /graphql в†’ :8081)
    82в†’web-dev:
    83в†’	$(MAKE) -C web dev
    84в†’
    85в†’## web-build: Type-check and build web frontend for production
    86в†’web-build:
    87в†’	$(MAKE) -C web build
    88в†’
    89в†’## web-lint: Run ESLint on web frontend
    90в†’web-lint:
    91в†’	$(MAKE) -C web lint
    92в†’
    93в†’## web-clean: Remove web build artifacts and node_modules
    94в†’web-clean:
    95в†’	$(MAKE) -C web clean
    96в†’
    97в†’## web-test: Run web unit tests
    98в†’web-test:
    99в†’	$(MAKE) -C web test
   100в†’
   101в†’## web-test-tdd: Run web tests with TDD Guard reporter when configured
   102в†’web-test-tdd:
   103в†’	$(MAKE) -C web test-tdd
   104в†’
   105в†’## web-schema-sync: Regenerate web/schema.graphql and graphql-env.d.ts from API SDL files
   106в†’web-schema-sync:
   107в†’	cat api/graph/schema/*.graphql > web/schema.graphql
   108в†’	cd web && pnpm exec gql-tada generate-output --tsconfig tsconfig.app.json
   109в†’
   110в†’## ext-install: Install Chrome extension dependencies
   111в†’ext-install:
   112в†’	cd chrome-extension && pnpm install
   113в†’
   114в†’## ext-build: Build Chrome extension (esbuild)
   115в†’ext-build:
   116в†’	cd chrome-extension && pnpm run build
   117в†’
   118в†’## ext-typecheck: Type-check Chrome extension TypeScript
   119в†’ext-typecheck:
   120в†’	cd chrome-extension && pnpm run typecheck
   121в†’
   122в†’## android-lint: Run Android lint and detekt (skips if no Gradle wrapper)
   123в†’android-lint:
   124в†’	@if [ -x android/gradlew ]; then \
   125в†’		cd android && ./gradlew :app:lint :app:detekt; \
   126в†’	else \
   127в†’		echo "android/gradlew not found вЂ” skipping Android lint"; \
   128в†’	fi

   131в†’lint: api-lint web-lint
   132в†’
   133в†’## dev: Start full-stack dev environment (Docker PG + air + Vite) with hot reload
   134в†’dev:

   137в†’## dev-db-up: Start standalone dev database (PG 16 + pgvector + MinIO on port 5433)
   138в†’dev-db-up:
   139в†’	docker compose -f compose/db.yml up -d --wait
   140в†’	@echo ""
   141в†’	@echo "Dev database starting on port 5433. Use:"
   142в†’	@echo "  DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/flotsam?sslmode=disable"
   143в†’	@echo ""
   144в†’	@echo "MinIO console: http://localhost:9001 (minioadmin/minioadmin)"
   145в†’
   146в†’## dev-db-down: Stop and remove the standalone dev database container
   147в†’dev-db-down:
   148в†’	docker compose -f compose/db.yml down
   149в†’
   150в†’## demo: Run demo walkthrough (visible browser, auto mode)
   151в†’demo:
   152в†’	bash scripts/demo.sh auto
   153в†’
   154в†’## demo-manual: Run demo walkthrough with manual pauses at each step
   155в†’demo-manual:
   156в†’	bash scripts/demo.sh manual
   157в†’
   158в†’## demo-headless: Run demo walkthrough headless (CI-friendly, exits non-zero on failure)
   159в†’demo-headless:
   160в†’	bash scripts/demo.sh headless
   161в†’
   162в†’## demo-api: Run headless GraphQL CRUD walkthrough (no browser needed)
   163в†’demo-api:
   164в†’	bash scripts/demo-api.sh
   165в†’
   166в†’## demo-install: Install demo dependencies and Playwright browsers
   167в†’demo-install:
   168в†’	cd demo && pnpm install && pnpm exec playwright install --with-deps chromium
   169в†’
   170в†’## test-quick: Fast checks вЂ” Go unit tests, TS type-check + build, ESLint (~10-20s, no DB)
   171в†’test-quick: api-test-unit web-build web-lint
   172в†’
   173в†’## test-standard: Full local validation вЂ” quick + web unit tests + Go lint + ext typecheck (~30-60s, no DB)
   174в†’test-standard: test-quick web-test api-lint ext-typecheck
   175в†’
   176в†’## test-full: Complete validation вЂ” standard + integration tests (requires DB + running services)
   177в†’test-full: test-standard api-test
   178в†’
   179в†’## coverage: Run coverage checks for Go and web
   180в†’coverage:
   181в†’	bash scripts/ci/check-coverage.sh
   182в†’
   183в†’## ci-changed: Run risk-aware checks on changed files (vs origin/main)
   184в†’ci-changed:
   185в†’	bash scripts/ci/run-changed.sh
   186в†’
   187в†’## ci-full: Run full-repo policy and analyzer checks
   188в†’ci-full:
   189в†’	bash scripts/ci/run-full.sh
   190в†’
   191в†’## scan-secrets: Run gitleaks secret scanning on the repo
   192в†’scan-secrets:
   193в†’	@if command -v gitleaks &>/dev/null; then \
   194в†’		gitleaks detect --source . --no-banner; \
   195в†’	else \
   196в†’		echo "gitleaks not installed вЂ” see docs/ci/scanning.md"; \
   197в†’	fi
   198в†’
   199в†’## scan-deps: Run osv-scanner dependency vulnerability scanning
   200в†’scan-deps:
   201в†’	@if command -v osv-scanner &>/dev/null; then \
   202в†’		osv-scanner scan --lockfile=api/go.sum --lockfile=web/pnpm-lock.yaml; \
   203в†’	else \
   204в†’		echo "osv-scanner not installed вЂ” see docs/ci/scanning.md"; \
   205в†’	fi
   206в†’
   207в†’## hooks-install: Configure git to use .githooks/ for pre-commit and pre-push
   208в†’hooks-install:
   209в†’	bash scripts/install-hooks.sh
   210в†’
   211в†’## help: List all available targets
   212в†’help:
   213в†’	@echo ""
   214в†’	@echo "Usage: make <target>"
   215в†’	@echo ""
   216в†’	@grep -hE '^## [a-z]' $(MAKEFILE_LIST) | sed 's/## //' | sort -t: -k1,1 | \
   217в†’		while IFS=: read -r target desc; do \
   218в†’			printf "  %-24s %s\n" "$$target" "$$desc"; \
   219в†’		done

1в†’# Flotsam
     2в†’
     3в†’Personal knowledge management system вЂ” a "second brain" for capturing thoughts,
     4в†’notes, URLs, and voice dictations, with semantic search and AI integration via MCP.
     5в†’
     6в†’## What it does
     7в†’
     8в†’- **Capture**: Save bookmarks (Chrome extension), voice notes (Android app),
     9в†’  and text notes with minimal friction
    10в†’- **Search**: Full-text and semantic (vector) search across everything you've saved
    11в†’- **AI integration**: MCP server lets AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor) search,
    12в†’  browse, and capture items in your knowledge base (JWT-authenticated)
    13в†’- **Self-hosted**: You own your data end-to-end, deployed on your VPS
    14в†’
    15в†’## Architecture
    16в†’
    17в†’```
    18в†’Clients (Chrome Extension, Android App, Web App, AI Tools via MCP)
    19в†’  в”‚
    20в†’  в–ј
    21в†’Go API Server (GraphQL + REST upload + MCP)
    22в†’  в”‚
    23в†’  в”њв”Ђв”Ђ PostgreSQL + pgvector (metadata, embeddings, FTS, jobs)
    24в†’  в””в”Ђв”Ђ S3-Compatible Storage (page HTML, audio files, documents)
    25в†’```
    26в†’
    27в†’See [docs/specs/product-overview.md](docs/specs/product-overview.md) for the
    28в†’full architecture document. For a user-facing summary, see
    29в†’[docs/flotsam-user-overview.md](docs/flotsam-user-overview.md).
    30в†’
    31в†’## Quick start
    32в†’
    33в†’```bash
    34в†’# Prerequisites: Go 1.24+, Node.js 22+, pnpm 9+, Docker
    35в†’
    36в†’cp .env.example .env          # Edit with your settings
    37в†’make dev                      # Start everything (DB + API + web)
    38в†’```
    39в†’
    40в†’| Service | URL |
    41в†’|---------|-----|
    42в†’| Web app | http://localhost:8080 |
    43в†’| API | http://localhost:8081 |
    44в†’| GraphQL Playground (dev mode) | http://localhost:8081/playground |
    45в†’| MinIO Console | http://localhost:9001 |
    46в†’
    47в†’## Development
    48в†’
    49в†’```bash
    50в†’make help                     # List all available targets
    51в†’make dev-db-up                # Start dev database only
    52в†’make api-build                # Build API binary
    53в†’make api-test                 # Run Go tests
    54в†’make web-install              # Install frontend dependencies
    55в†’make web-dev                  # Start frontend dev server
    56в†’make hooks-install            # Set up pre-commit and pre-push hooks
    57в†’make test-quick               # Fast checks (no DB required)
    58в†’make test-standard            # Full local validation
    59в†’```
    60в†’
    61в†’## Project structure
    62в†’
    63в†’```
    64в†’flotsam/

1в†’# Plan: flt-it8.11 вЂ” Android Voice Capture App
     2в†’
     3в†’## Context
     4в†’
     5в†’Flotsam needs an Android app for quick voice note capture. The API already has:
     6в†’- `POST /upload` вЂ” multipart file upload (auth required, max 50MB, supports `audio/mp4`/m4a)
     7в†’- `captureVoiceNote` GraphQL mutation вЂ” takes `audioKey`, `title`, `tags`, `sensitivity`, `source`
     8в†’- JWT auth (HS256) with `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header
     9в†’
    10в†’The app should minimize friction: quick-action widget or notification shortcut for fast recording while driving.
    11в†’
    12в†’## Implementation
    13в†’
    14в†’### 1. Project scaffold (`android/`)
    15в†’
    16в†’Standard Android/Gradle project with Kotlin DSL and version catalog:
    17в†’
    18в†’```
    19в†’android/
    20в†’в”њв”Ђв”Ђ app/
    21в†’в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ build.gradle.kts
    22в†’в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ src/main/
    23в†’в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ AndroidManifest.xml
    24в†’в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ java/com/flotsam/capture/
    25в†’в”‚       в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ MainActivity.kt          вЂ” single-activity host
    26в†’в”‚       в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ FlotsamApp.kt            вЂ” Application class
    27в†’в”‚       в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ui/
    28в†’в”‚       в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ theme/Theme.kt       вЂ” Material 3 theme
    29в†’в”‚       в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ record/RecordScreen.kt   вЂ” main recording UI
    30в†’в”‚       в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ settings/SettingsScreen.kt вЂ” API URL + token config
    31в†’в”‚       в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ navigation/Navigation.kt
    32в†’в”‚       в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ audio/AudioRecorder.kt   вЂ” MediaRecorder wrapper
    33в†’в”‚       в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ network/
    34в†’в”‚       в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ApiClient.kt         вЂ” OkHttp + upload logic
    35в†’в”‚       в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ GraphQLClient.kt     вЂ” captureVoiceNote mutation
    36в†’в”‚       в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ data/SettingsStore.kt    вЂ” DataStore preferences
    37в†’в”‚       в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ widget/QuickCaptureReceiver.kt вЂ” notification shortcut
    38в†’в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ res/
    39в†’в”‚           в”њв”Ђв”Ђ drawable/               вЂ” icons
    40в†’в”‚           в”њв”Ђв”Ђ values/strings.xml
    41в†’в”‚           в””в”Ђв”Ђ xml/shortcuts.xml       вЂ” app shortcuts
    42в†’в”њв”Ђв”Ђ gradle/
    43в†’в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ wrapper/
    44в†’в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ gradle-wrapper.properties
    45в†’в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ libs.versions.toml             вЂ” version catalog
    46в†’в”њв”Ђв”Ђ build.gradle.kts                   вЂ” root build file
    47в†’в”њв”Ђв”Ђ settings.gradle.kts
    48в†’в”њв”Ђв”Ђ gradle.properties
    49в†’в”њв”Ђв”Ђ gradlew / gradlew.bat
    50в†’в””в”Ђв”Ђ README.md
    51в†’```
    52в†’
    53в†’### 2. Dependencies (version catalog)
    54в†’
    55в†’- **Jetpack Compose** BOM (latest stable) вЂ” UI
    56в†’- **Material 3** вЂ” theming
    57в†’- **OkHttp 4** вЂ” HTTP client for multipart upload
    58в†’- **Gson** вЂ” JSON parsing (lightweight, no codegen needed)
    59в†’- **DataStore Preferences** вЂ” settings persistence
    60в†’- **Navigation Compose** вЂ” screen navigation
    61в†’- **Compose Runtime** вЂ” for state management
    62в†’
    63в†’### 3. Key components
    64в†’
    65в†’**AudioRecorder** (`audio/AudioRecorder.kt`):
    66в†’- Wraps `MediaRecorder` for M4A (AAC) recording
    67в†’- Start/stop/cancel with temp file management
    68в†’- Returns `File` path on completion
    69в†’
    70в†’**ApiClient** (`network/ApiClient.kt`):
    71в†’- `uploadAudio(file: File, token: String, baseUrl: String)` в†’ `UploadResponse`
    72в†’- Multipart POST to `/upload` with `file` field, `audio/mp4` content type
    73в†’- JWT Bearer auth header
    74в†’
    75в†’**GraphQLClient** (`network/GraphQLClient.kt`):
    76в†’- `captureVoiceNote(audioKey: String, tags: List<String>, token: String, baseUrl: String)`
    77в†’- Simple HTTP POST to `/graphql` with JSON body (no heavy GraphQL library needed)
    78в†’- Source set to `"android_app"`
    79в†’
    80в†’**RecordScreen** (`ui/record/RecordScreen.kt`):
    81в†’- Large record button (Material 3 FAB style)
    82в†’- Recording timer display
    83в†’- Stop/cancel buttons during recording
    84в†’- Optional tag input chip field
    85в†’- Upload progress indicator
    86в†’- Status feedback (success/error)
    87в†’
    88в†’**SettingsScreen** (`ui/settings/SettingsScreen.kt`):
    89в†’- API URL text field (default: empty, must configure)
    90в†’- JWT token text field (paste from web app)
    91в†’- Connection test button
    92в†’
    93в†’**QuickCaptureReceiver** (`widget/QuickCaptureReceiver.kt`):
    94в†’- Static app shortcut (long-press icon в†’ "Quick Record")
    95в†’- Notification shortcut for persistent quick-access
    96в†’- Launches directly into recording mode
    97в†’
    98в†’### 4. Permissions
    99в†’
   100в†’```xml
   101в†’<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.RECORD_AUDIO" />
   102в†’<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
   103в†’<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS" />  <!-- Android 13+ -->
   104в†’```
   105в†’
   106в†’### 5. Upload flow
   107в†’
   108в†’1. User taps record в†’ `AudioRecorder.start()` в†’ writes M4A to cache dir
   109в†’2. User taps stop в†’ `AudioRecorder.stop()` в†’ returns `File`
   110в†’3. App calls `ApiClient.uploadAudio(file)` в†’ gets `UploadResponse{key, content_type, size}`
   111в†’4. App calls `GraphQLClient.captureVoiceNote(audioKey=response.key, tags=userTags, source="android_app")`
   112в†’5. Show success/error feedback
   113в†’6. Clean up temp file
   114в†’
   115в†’### 6. Files to create
   116в†’
   117в†’All under `android/` in the repo root (~20 files total). No changes to existing Go or web code.
   118в†’
   119в†’## Verification
   120в†’
   121в†’- Gradle project structure follows Android conventions
   122в†’- Kotlin source files have valid syntax (no compilation errors on inspection)
   123в†’- `README.md` documents: prerequisites (Android Studio, JDK 17), build steps, configuration
   124в†’- Manifest declares correct permissions and activities
   125в†’- `.gitignore` excludes build artifacts, `.gradle/`, local properties
   126в†’

1в†’# Flotsam Android App
     2в†’
     3в†’Voice note capture app for Flotsam. Records audio and uploads to the Flotsam API
     4в†’for transcription, embedding, and classification.
     5в†’
     6в†’## Features
     7в†’
     8в†’- **Voice recording**: Tap-to-record with timer display (M4A/AAC format)
     9в†’- **Quick capture**: Long-press app icon for instant recording shortcut
    10в†’- **Upload**: Multipart upload to `/upload` endpoint with JWT auth
    11в†’- **Auto-processing**: Uploaded voice notes are automatically transcribed and indexed
    12в†’- **Material You**: Dynamic color theming on Android 12+
    13в†’
    14в†’## Prerequisites
    15в†’
    16в†’- **Android Studio** Ladybug (2024.2.1) or newer
    17в†’- **JDK 17** (bundled with Android Studio)
    18в†’- **Android SDK 35** (install via SDK Manager)
    19в†’- **A running Flotsam API server** with S3 storage configured
    20в†’
    21в†’## Build
    22в†’
    23в†’1. Open the `android/` directory in Android Studio
    24в†’2. Sync Gradle (automatic on first open)
    25в†’3. Build в†’ Make Project (or `./gradlew assembleDebug` from command line)
    26в†’
    27в†’```bash
    28в†’cd android
    29в†’./gradlew assembleDebug
    30в†’```
    31в†’
    32в†’The APK will be at `app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk`.
    33в†’
    34в†’## Setup
    35в†’
    36в†’1. Install the app on your Android device or emulator
    37в†’2. Open Settings (gear icon in top bar)
    38в†’3. Enter your Flotsam **API URL** (e.g., `https://flotsam.example.com`)
    39в†’4. Paste your **JWT token** from the Flotsam web app
    40в†’5. Tap **Test Connection** to verify
    41в†’6. Tap **Save**
    42в†’
    43в†’## Usage
    44в†’
    45в†’### Standard recording
    46в†’1. Open the app
    47в†’2. Optionally enter comma-separated tags
    48в†’3. Tap the microphone button to start recording
    49в†’4. Tap stop to finish and upload, or cancel to discard
    50в†’
    51в†’### Quick capture
    52в†’- Long-press the app icon on your home screen
    53в†’- Tap **Quick Record** to start recording immediately
    54в†’
    55в†’## API Integration
    56в†’
    57в†’The app communicates with two Flotsam API endpoints:
    58в†’
    59в†’| Endpoint | Method | Purpose |
    60в†’|---|---|---|
    61в†’| `/upload` | POST (multipart) | Upload audio file (M4A) |
    62в†’| `/graphql` | POST | `captureVoiceNote` mutation to create item |
    63в†’| `/health` | GET | Connection test |
    64в†’
    65в†’Authentication: `Authorization: Bearer <JWT>` header on all requests.
    66в†’
    67в†’## Architecture
    68в†’
    69в†’```
    70в†’com.flotsam.capture/
    71в†’в”њв”Ђв”Ђ MainActivity.kt          вЂ” Single-activity Compose host
    72в†’в”њв”Ђв”Ђ FlotsamApp.kt            вЂ” Application class
    73в†’в”њв”Ђв”Ђ audio/
    74в†’в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ AudioRecorder.kt     вЂ” MediaRecorder wrapper (M4A/AAC)
    75в†’в”њв”Ђв”Ђ data/
    76в†’в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ SettingsStore.kt     вЂ” DataStore preferences (API URL, token)
    77в†’в”њв”Ђв”Ђ network/
    78в†’в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ApiClient.kt         вЂ” OkHttp multipart upload
    79в†’в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ GraphQLClient.kt     вЂ” captureVoiceNote mutation
    80в†’в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ui/
    81в†’в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ navigation/Navigation.kt
    82в†’в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ record/RecordScreen.kt    вЂ” Main recording UI
    83в†’в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ settings/SettingsScreen.kt
    84в†’в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ theme/Theme.kt
    85в†’в””в”Ђв”Ђ widget/
    86в†’    в””в”Ђв”Ђ QuickCaptureReceiver.kt   вЂ” (reserved for future widget)
    87в†’```
    88в†’
    89в†’## Development
    90в†’
    91в†’- **Min SDK**: 26 (Android 8.0)
    92в†’- **Target SDK**: 35 (Android 15)
    93в†’- **Language**: Kotlin 2.1
    94в†’- **UI**: Jetpack Compose with Material 3
    95в†’- **HTTP**: OkHttp 4
    96в†’- **Settings**: Jetpack DataStore

1в†’#!/usr/bin/env bash

    14в†’STRICT="${FLOTSAM_STRICT:-0}"
    15в†’EXIT_CODE=0
    16в†’STAGED=0

    19в†’    STAGED=1
    20в†’    DETECT_ARGS=(--staged)

    22в†’    DETECT_ARGS=()
    23в†’fi

    25в†’# --- Step 1: Risk classification ---
    26в†’echo "=== Risk Classification ==="
    27в†’if ! python3 scripts/ci/detect-risk.py "${DETECT_ARGS[@]}" --severity-threshold critical; then
    28в†’    echo ""
    29в†’    echo "CRITICAL risk detected вЂ” manual review required."
    30в†’    if [[ "$STRICT" == "1" ]]; then
    31в†’        EXIT_CODE=1
    32в†’    fi
    33в†’fi
    34в†’echo ""
    35в†’
    36в†’# --- Step 2: Determine what changed ---
    37в†’if [[ "$STAGED" == "1" ]]; then
    38в†’    changed=$(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR)
    39в†’else
    40в†’    merge_base=$(git merge-base HEAD origin/main 2>/dev/null || echo "HEAD")
    41в†’    changed=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR "${merge_base}...HEAD" 2>/dev/null || true)
    42в†’fi
    43в†’
    44в†’if [[ -z "$changed" ]]; then
    45в†’    echo "No changed files detected."

    48в†’
    49в†’go_changed=0
    50в†’web_changed=0
    51в†’ext_changed=0
    52в†’docs_changed=0
    53в†’

    66в†’    if ! make api-test-unit; then

    69в†’    fi

    72в†’        EXIT_CODE=1
    73в†’    fi

    77в†’        if [[ "$STRICT" == "1" ]]; then

    79в†’        fi
    80в†’    fi
    81в†’    echo ""
    82в†’fi
    83в†’
    84в†’if [[ "$web_changed" == "1" ]]; then
    85в†’    echo "=== Web Checks ==="
    86в†’    if ! make web-build; then
    87в†’        echo "Web build FAILED"
    88в†’        EXIT_CODE=1
    89в†’    fi
    90в†’    if ! make web-lint; then
    91в†’        echo "Web lint FAILED"
    92в†’        EXIT_CODE=1
    93в†’    fi
    94в†’    echo ""
    95в†’fi
    96в†’
    97в†’if [[ "$ext_changed" == "1" ]]; then
    98в†’    echo "=== Chrome Extension Checks ==="
    99в†’    if ! make ext-install; then
   100в†’        echo "Extension install FAILED"
   101в†’        EXIT_CODE=1
   102в†’    fi
   103в†’    if ! make ext-typecheck; then
   104в†’        echo "Extension typecheck FAILED"
   105в†’        EXIT_CODE=1
   106в†’    fi
   107в†’    if ! make ext-build; then
   108в†’        echo "Extension build FAILED"
   109в†’        EXIT_CODE=1
   110в†’    fi
   111в†’    echo ""
   112в†’fi
   113в†’
   114в†’if [[ "$docs_changed" == "1" ]]; then

   116в†’    if ! bash scripts/ci/check-doc-commands.sh; then
   117в†’        echo "Doc command audit found mismatches"
   118в†’        if [[ "$STRICT" == "1" ]]; then

   131в†’# --- Step 4: Summary ---

   142в†’
   143в†’exit "$EXIT_CODE"

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Run risk-aware checks on changed files.
# Usage:
#   run-changed.sh           # diff against origin/main
#   run-changed.sh --staged  # staged changes only (pre-commit hook)
#
# Environment:
#   FLOTSAM_STRICT=1  вЂ” exit non-zero on any failure (default: advisory)
set -euo pipefail

repo_root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
cd "$repo_root"

STRICT="${FLOTSAM_STRICT:-0}"
EXIT_CODE=0
STAGED=0

if [[ "${1:-}" == "--staged" ]]; then
    STAGED=1
    DETECT_ARGS=(--staged)
else
    DETECT_ARGS=()
fi

# --- Step 1: Risk classification ---
echo "=== Risk Classification ==="
if ! python3 scripts/ci/detect-risk.py "${DETECT_ARGS[@]}" --severity-threshold critical; then
    echo ""
    echo "CRITICAL risk detected вЂ” manual review required."
    if [[ "$STRICT" == "1" ]]; then
        EXIT_CODE=1
    fi
fi
echo ""

# --- Step 2: Determine what changed ---
if [[ "$STAGED" == "1" ]]; then
    changed=$(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR)
else
    merge_base=$(git merge-base HEAD origin/main 2>/dev/null || echo "HEAD")
    changed=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR "${merge_base}...HEAD" 2>/dev/null || true)
fi

if [[ -z "$changed" ]]; then
    echo "No changed files detected."
    exit 0
fi

go_changed=0
web_changed=0
ext_changed=0
docs_changed=0

while IFS= read -r file; do
    case "$file" in
        api/*) go_changed=1 ;;
        web/*) web_changed=1 ;;
        chrome-extension/*) ext_changed=1 ;;
        README.md|AGENTS.md|CLAUDE.md|api/CLAUDE.md|web/CLAUDE.md|docs/*|Makefile) docs_changed=1 ;;
    esac
done <<< "$changed"

# --- Step 3: Run targeted checks ---
if [[ "$go_changed" == "1" ]]; then
    echo "=== Go Checks ==="
    if ! make api-test-unit; then
        echo "Go unit tests FAILED"
        EXIT_CODE=1
    fi
    if ! make api-lint; then
        echo "Go lint FAILED"
        EXIT_CODE=1
    fi
    echo "--- Go security analyzers (advisory) ---"
    if ! make api-security; then
        echo "Security analyzers reported findings"
        if [[ "$STRICT" == "1" ]]; then
            EXIT_CODE=1
        fi
    fi
    echo ""
fi

if [[ "$web_changed" == "1" ]]; then
    echo "=== Web Checks ==="
    if ! make web-build; then
        echo "Web build FAILED"
        EXIT_CODE=1
    fi
    if ! make web-lint; then
        echo "Web lint FAILED"
        EXIT_CODE=1
    fi
    echo ""
fi

if [[ "$ext_changed" == "1" ]]; then
    echo "=== Chrome Extension Checks ==="
    if ! make ext-install; then
        echo "Extension install FAILED"
        EXIT_CODE=1
    fi
    if ! make ext-typecheck; then
        echo "Extension typecheck FAILED"
        EXIT_CODE=1
    fi
    if ! make ext-build; then
        echo "Extension build FAILED"
        EXIT_CODE=1
    fi
    echo ""
fi

if [[ "$docs_changed" == "1" ]]; then
    echo "=== Doc Checks ==="
    if ! bash scripts/ci/check-doc-commands.sh; then
        echo "Doc command audit found mismatches"
        if [[ "$STRICT" == "1" ]]; then
            EXIT_CODE=1
        fi
    fi
    if ! python3 scripts/ci/check-placeholders.py; then
        echo "Placeholder check found mismatches"
        if [[ "$STRICT" == "1" ]]; then
            EXIT_CODE=1
        fi
    fi
    echo ""
fi

# --- Step 4: Summary ---
if [[ "$EXIT_CODE" != "0" ]]; then
    if [[ "$STRICT" == "1" ]]; then
        echo "FAILED вЂ” strict mode, exiting with error."
    else
        echo "Issues found (advisory mode вЂ” not blocking)."
        EXIT_CODE=0
    fi
else
    echo "All checks passed."
fi

exit "$EXIT_CODE"

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Run available static analyzers, skip gracefully if not installed.
# Exit code: 0 = no findings (or no tools installed), 1 = findings reported.
set -euo pipefail

repo_root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
cd "$repo_root"

FINDINGS=0
RAN=0

# --- gosec ---
if command -v gosec &>/dev/null; then
    echo "=== gosec ==="
    if (cd api && gosec ./...); then
        echo "gosec: clean"
    else
        echo "gosec: findings reported"
        FINDINGS=1
    fi
    RAN=1
    echo ""
else
    echo "gosec not installed вЂ” skipping"
fi

# --- govulncheck ---
if command -v govulncheck &>/dev/null; then
    echo "=== govulncheck ==="
    if (cd api && govulncheck ./...); then
        echo "govulncheck: clean"
    else
        echo "govulncheck: findings reported"
        FINDINGS=1
    fi
    RAN=1
    echo ""
else
    echo "govulncheck not installed вЂ” skipping"
fi

# --- semgrep ---
if command -v semgrep &>/dev/null; then
    echo "=== semgrep ==="
    if semgrep --config auto --quiet .; then
        echo "semgrep: clean"
    else
        echo "semgrep: findings reported"
        FINDINGS=1
    fi
    RAN=1
    echo ""
else
    echo "semgrep not installed вЂ” skipping"
fi

# --- gitleaks ---
if command -v gitleaks &>/dev/null; then
    echo "=== gitleaks ==="
    if gitleaks detect --source . --no-banner; then
        echo "gitleaks: clean"
    else
        echo "gitleaks: findings reported"
        FINDINGS=1
    fi
    RAN=1
    echo ""
else
    echo "gitleaks not installed вЂ” skipping"
fi

# --- osv-scanner ---
if command -v osv-scanner &>/dev/null; then
    echo "=== osv-scanner ==="
    OSV_ARGS=()
    [[ -f api/go.sum ]] && OSV_ARGS+=(--lockfile=api/go.sum)
    [[ -f web/pnpm-lock.yaml ]] && OSV_ARGS+=(--lockfile=web/pnpm-lock.yaml)
    if [[ ${#OSV_ARGS[@]} -eq 0 ]]; then
        echo "osv-scanner: no lockfiles found вЂ” skipping"
    elif osv-scanner scan "${OSV_ARGS[@]}"; then
        echo "osv-scanner: clean"
    else
        echo "osv-scanner: findings reported"
        FINDINGS=1
    fi
    RAN=1
    echo ""
else
    echo "osv-scanner not installed вЂ” skipping"
fi

# --- Android lint ---
if [[ -x android/gradlew ]]; then
    echo "=== Android lint ==="
    if (cd android && ./gradlew :app:lint --quiet); then
        echo "Android lint: clean"
    else
        echo "Android lint: findings reported"
        FINDINGS=1
    fi
    RAN=1
    echo ""
else
    echo "android/gradlew not found вЂ” skipping Android lint"
fi

# --- detekt ---
if [[ -x android/gradlew ]]; then
    echo "=== detekt ==="
    if (cd android && ./gradlew :app:detekt --quiet); then
        echo "detekt: clean"
    else
        echo "detekt: findings reported"
        FINDINGS=1
    fi
    RAN=1
    echo ""
else
    echo "android/gradlew not found вЂ” skipping detekt"
fi

if [[ "$RAN" == "0" ]]; then
    echo "No static analyzers installed. Install gosec, govulncheck, semgrep, gitleaks, or osv-scanner for enhanced checks."
fi

exit "$FINDINGS"

file.content:
## Flotsam Monorepo Makefile вЂ” delegates to component Makefiles
## Usage: make <target>

# Load .env if present вЂ” makes vars available to shell commands in recipes
-include .env

.PHONY: api-build api-run api-generate api-test api-test-unit api-test-tdd \
        api-lint api-security api-migrate-up api-migrate-down api-clean \
        web-install web-dev web-build web-lint web-clean web-test web-test-tdd web-schema-sync \
        ext-install ext-build ext-typecheck \
        android-lint \
        lint \
        dev dev-db-up dev-db-down \
        demo demo-manual demo-headless demo-api demo-install \
        test-quick test-standard test-full \
        ci-changed ci-full hooks-install \
        scan-secrets scan-deps \
        coverage \
        help

## api-build: Build all API binaries (flotsamd, flotsam-worker, flotsam)
api-build:
	$(MAKE) -C api build

## api-run: Run the API server (flotsamd)
api-run:
	$(MAKE) -C api run

## api-run-worker: Run the job worker (flotsam-worker --watch)
api-run-worker:
	$(MAKE) -C api run-worker

## api-generate: Run GraphQL code generation
api-generate:
	$(MAKE) -C api generate

## api-test: Run all API tests
api-test:
	$(MAKE) -C api test

## api-test-unit: Run API unit tests
api-test-unit:
	$(MAKE) -C api test-unit

## api-test-tdd: Run API tests with tdd-guard-go when installed
api-test-tdd:
	$(MAKE) -C api test-tdd

## api-lint: Run linter on the API
api-lint:
	$(MAKE) -C api lint

## api-migrate-up: Apply database migrations
api-migrate-up:
	$(MAKE) -C api migrate-up

## api-migrate-down: Roll back last database migration
api-migrate-down:
	$(MAKE) -C api migrate-down

## api-seed: Populate dev database with sample data
api-seed:
	$(MAKE) -C api seed

## api-dev-token: Mint a dev JWT for local testing
api-dev-token:
	$(MAKE) -C api dev-token

## api-security: Run Go security analyzers (gosec + govulncheck)
api-security:
	$(MAKE) -C api security

## api-clean: Remove API build artifacts
api-clean:
	$(MAKE) -C api clean

## web-install: Install web frontend dependencies
web-install:
	$(MAKE) -C web install

## web-dev: Start Vite dev server (port 8080, proxies /graphql в†’ :8081)
web-dev:
	$(MAKE) -C web dev

## web-build: Type-check and build web frontend for production
web-build:
	$(MAKE) -C web build

## web-lint: Run ESLint on web frontend
web-lint:
	$(MAKE) -C web lint

## web-clean: Remove web build artifacts and node_modules
web-clean:
	$(MAKE) -C web clean

## web-test: Run web unit tests
web-test:
	$(MAKE) -C web test

## web-test-tdd: Run web tests with TDD Guard reporter when configured
web-test-tdd:
	$(MAKE) -C web test-tdd

## web-schema-sync: Regenerate web/schema.graphql and graphql-env.d.ts from API SDL files
web-schema-sync:
	cat api/graph/schema/*.graphql > web/schema.graphql
	cd web && pnpm exec gql-tada generate-output --tsconfig tsconfig.app.json

## ext-install: Install Chrome extension dependencies
ext-install:
	cd chrome-extension && pnpm install

## ext-build: Build Chrome extension (esbuild)
ext-build:
	cd chrome-extension && pnpm run build

## ext-typecheck: Type-check Chrome extension TypeScript
ext-typecheck:
	cd chrome-extension && pnpm run typecheck

## android-lint: Run Android lint and detekt (skips if no Gradle wrapper)
android-lint:
	@if [ -x android/gradlew ]; then \
		cd android && ./gradlew :app:lint :app:detekt; \
	else \
		echo "android/gradlew not found вЂ” skipping Android lint"; \
	fi

## lint: Run all linters (Go + web)
lint: api-lint web-lint

## dev: Start full-stack dev environment (Docker PG + air + Vite) with hot reload
dev:
	bash scripts/dev.sh

## dev-db-up: Start standalone dev database (PG 16 + pgvector + MinIO on port 5433)
dev-db-up:
	docker compose -f compose/db.yml up -d --wait
	@echo ""
	@echo "Dev database starting on port 5433. Use:"
	@echo "  DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/flotsam?sslmode=disable"
	@echo ""
	@echo "MinIO console: http://localhost:9001 (minioadmin/minioadmin)"

## dev-db-down: Stop and remove the standalone dev database container
dev-db-down:
	docker compose -f compose/db.yml down

## demo: Run demo walkthrough (visible browser, auto mode)
demo:
	bash scripts/demo.sh auto

## demo-manual: Run demo walkthrough with manual pauses at each step
demo-manual:
	bash scripts/demo.sh manual

## demo-headless: Run demo walkthrough headless (CI-friendly, exits non-zero on failure)
demo-headless:
	bash scripts/demo.sh headless

## demo-api: Run headless GraphQL CRUD walkthrough (no browser needed)
demo-api:
	bash scripts/demo-api.sh

## demo-install: Install demo dependencies and Playwright browsers
demo-install:
	cd demo && pnpm install && pnpm exec playwright install --with-deps chromium

## test-quick: Fast checks вЂ” Go unit tests, TS type-check + build, ESLint (~10-20s, no DB)
test-quick: api-test-unit web-build web-lint

## test-standard: Full local validation вЂ” quick + web unit tests + Go lint + ext typecheck (~30-60s, no DB)
test-standard: test-quick web-test api-lint ext-typecheck

## test-full: Complete validation вЂ” standard + integration tests (requires DB + running services)
test-full: test-standard api-test

## coverage: Run coverage checks for Go and web
coverage:
	bash scripts/ci/check-coverage.sh

## ci-changed: Run risk-aware checks on changed files (vs origin/main)
ci-changed:
	bash scripts/ci/run-changed.sh

## ci-full: Run full-repo policy and analyzer checks
ci-full:
	bash scripts/ci/run-full.sh

## scan-secrets: Run gitleaks secret scanning on the repo
scan-secrets:
	@if command -v gitleaks &>/dev/null; then \
		gitleaks detect --source . --no-banner; \
	else \
		echo "gitleaks not installed вЂ” see docs/ci/scanning.md"; \
	fi

## scan-deps: Run osv-scanner dependency vulnerability scanning
scan-deps:
	@if command -v osv-scanner &>/dev/null; then \
		osv-scanner scan --lockfile=api/go.sum --lockfile=web/pnpm-lock.yaml; \
	else \
		echo "osv-scanner not installed вЂ” see docs/ci/scanning.md"; \
	fi

## hooks-install: Configure git to use .githooks/ for pre-commit and pre-push
hooks-install:
	bash scripts/install-hooks.sh

## help: List all available targets
help:
	@echo ""
	@echo "Usage: make <target>"
	@echo ""
	@grep -hE '^## [a-z]' $(MAKEFILE_LIST) | sed 's/## //' | sort -t: -k1,1 | \
		while IFS=: read -r target desc; do \
			printf "  %-24s %s\n" "$$target" "$$desc"; \
		done

file.content:
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

env:
  GO_VERSION: "1.24"
  NODE_VERSION: "22"
  PNPM_VERSION: "9"
  FLOTSAM_STRICT: "1"
  FLOTSAM_RUN_QUALITY_GATES: "1"

jobs:
  changed:
    name: Risk-aware changed checks
    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: ${{ env.GO_VERSION }}

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: ${{ env.PNPM_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache pnpm store
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.local/share/pnpm/store
          key: pnpm-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('web/pnpm-lock.yaml', 'chrome-extension/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: pnpm-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Install web dependencies
        run: make web-install

      - name: Install extension dependencies
        run: make ext-install

      - name: Run changed-file checks
        run: make ci-changed

  standard:
    name: Standard checks
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: ${{ env.GO_VERSION }}

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: ${{ env.PNPM_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache pnpm store
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.local/share/pnpm/store
          key: pnpm-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('web/pnpm-lock.yaml', 'chrome-extension/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: pnpm-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Install web dependencies
        run: make web-install

      - name: Install extension dependencies
        run: make ext-install

      - name: Run test-standard
        run: make test-standard

  coverage:
    name: Coverage
    needs: standard
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: ${{ env.GO_VERSION }}

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: ${{ env.PNPM_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache pnpm store
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.local/share/pnpm/store
          key: pnpm-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('web/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: pnpm-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Install web dependencies
        run: make web-install

      - name: Run coverage checks
        run: make coverage

      - name: Upload coverage reports
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-reports
          path: |
            api/coverage/
            web/coverage/
          retention-days: 14

  analyzers:
    name: Static analyzers
    needs: standard
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: ${{ env.GO_VERSION }}

      - name: Install analyzers
        run: |
          go install github.com/securego/gosec/v2/cmd/gosec@latest
          go install golang.org/x/vuln/cmd/govulncheck@latest
          curl -sSfL https://github.com/gitleaks/gitleaks/releases/latest/download/gitleaks_8.21.2_linux_x64.tar.gz \
            | tar -xz -C /usr/local/bin gitleaks

      - name: Run static analyzers
        run: bash scripts/ci/run-static-analyzers.sh

      - name: Upload analyzer output
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: analyzer-reports
          path: |
            api/gosec-report.*
            api/govulncheck-report.*
          retention-days: 14

file.content:
# Flotsam Android App

Voice note capture app for Flotsam. Records audio and uploads to the Flotsam API
for transcription, embedding, and classification.

## Features

- **Voice recording**: Tap-to-record with timer display (M4A/AAC format)
- **Quick capture**: Long-press app icon for instant recording shortcut
- **Upload**: Multipart upload to `/upload` endpoint with JWT auth
- **Auto-processing**: Uploaded voice notes are automatically transcribed and indexed
- **Material You**: Dynamic color theming on Android 12+

## Prerequisites

- **Android Studio** Ladybug (2024.2.1) or newer
- **JDK 17** (bundled with Android Studio)
- **Android SDK 35** (install via SDK Manager)
- **A running Flotsam API server** with S3 storage configured

## Build

1. Open the `android/` directory in Android Studio
2. Sync Gradle (automatic on first open)
3. Build в†’ Make Project (or `./gradlew assembleDebug` from command line)

```bash
cd android
./gradlew assembleDebug
```

The APK will be at `app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk`.

## Setup

1. Install the app on your Android device or emulator
2. Open Settings (gear icon in top bar)
3. Enter your Flotsam **API URL** (e.g., `https://flotsam.example.com`)
4. Paste your **JWT token** from the Flotsam web app
5. Tap **Test Connection** to verify
6. Tap **Save**

## Usage

### Standard recording
1. Open the app
2. Optionally enter comma-separated tags
3. Tap the microphone button to start recording
4. Tap stop to finish and upload, or cancel to discard

### Quick capture
- Long-press the app icon on your home screen
- Tap **Quick Record** to start recording immediately

## API Integration

The app communicates with two Flotsam API endpoints:

| Endpoint | Method | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `/upload` | POST (multipart) | Upload audio file (M4A) |
| `/graphql` | POST | `captureVoiceNote` mutation to create item |
| `/health` | GET | Connection test |

Authentication: `Authorization: Bearer <JWT>` header on all requests.

## Architecture

```
com.flotsam.capture/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ MainActivity.kt          вЂ” Single-activity Compose host
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ FlotsamApp.kt            вЂ” Application class
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ audio/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ AudioRecorder.kt     вЂ” MediaRecorder wrapper (M4A/AAC)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ data/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ SettingsStore.kt     вЂ” DataStore preferences (API URL, token)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ network/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ApiClient.kt         вЂ” OkHttp multipart upload
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ GraphQLClient.kt     вЂ” captureVoiceNote mutation
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ui/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ navigation/Navigation.kt
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ record/RecordScreen.kt    вЂ” Main recording UI
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ settings/SettingsScreen.kt
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ theme/Theme.kt
в””в”Ђв”Ђ widget/
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ QuickCaptureReceiver.kt   вЂ” (reserved for future widget)
```

## Development

- **Min SDK**: 26 (Android 8.0)
- **Target SDK**: 35 (Android 15)
- **Language**: Kotlin 2.1
- **UI**: Jetpack Compose with Material 3
- **HTTP**: OkHttp 4
- **Settings**: Jetpack DataStore

# Plan: Android CI Readiness (flt-2gt)

## Context

The Android app (`android/`) is a real Kotlin/Compose project with source code, tests, and build configs, but it's missing the Gradle wrapper executables (`gradlew`, `gradlew.bat`, `gradle-wrapper.jar`). This means:
- `make android-lint` silently skips
- `run-static-analyzers.sh` Android/detekt sections silently skip
- `run-changed.sh` doesn't detect `android/*` changes at all
- CI workflows have no Android steps

The app is presented as a shipped surface (referenced in README) but has zero CI coverage.

## Changes

### 1. Add Gradle wrapper files
- Run `gradle wrapper --gradle-version 8.11.1` inside `android/` to generate `gradlew`, `gradlew.bat`, and `gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar`
- The `gradle-wrapper.properties` already exists pointing to 8.11.1
- These files must be committed to the repo (standard practice)

### 2. Add `android/*` detection to `run-changed.sh`
- Add `android_changed=0` variable (line ~53)
- Add `android/*) android_changed=1 ;;` case in the detection loop (line ~59)
- Add Android checks block: run `make android-lint` when `android_changed=1` (advisory, not strict)

**File:** `scripts/ci/run-changed.sh`

### 3. Wire `android-lint` into the `lint` Makefile target
- Change `lint: api-lint web-lint` в†’ `lint: api-lint web-lint android-lint`
- Since `android-lint` already gracefully skips when gradlew is missing, this is safe

### 4. Add `android-test` Makefile target
- New target that runs `./gradlew :app:test` (JVM unit tests only вЂ” no emulator needed)
- Same graceful-skip pattern as `android-lint`

**File:** `Makefile`

### 5. Add Android CI job to `.github/workflows/ci.yml`
- New `android` job that runs on `ubuntu-latest`
- Uses `actions/setup-java@v4` with JDK 17
- Caches Gradle home (`~/.gradle/caches`, `~/.gradle/wrapper`)
- Runs: `make android-lint` and `make android-test`
- Runs after `standard` (parallel with `coverage` and `analyzers`) to avoid slowing the critical path
- No Android SDK setup needed вЂ” AGP downloads what it needs via `sdkmanager`

### 6. Update docs
- Add `make android-lint` and `make android-test` to the CLAUDE.md commands table
- Add Android prerequisites note to CLAUDE.md (JDK 17 for command-line builds)
- Verify `android/README.md` still matches (it references `./gradlew` which will now exist)

## Files to modify
- `android/gradlew` (new вЂ” generated)
- `android/gradlew.bat` (new вЂ” generated)
- `android/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar` (new вЂ” generated)
- `Makefile` вЂ” add `android-test`, wire `android-lint` into `lint`
- `scripts/ci/run-changed.sh` вЂ” add `android/*` detection
- `.github/workflows/ci.yml` вЂ” add `android` job
- `CLAUDE.md` вЂ” add Android targets to commands table

## Verification
1. Run `android/gradlew --version` to confirm wrapper works
2. Run `make android-lint` вЂ” should invoke Gradle (may fail without Android SDK locally, but should not silently skip)
3. Run `make android-test` вЂ” should invoke Gradle test task
4. Verify `run-changed.sh` detects android file changes
5. Review CI YAML for syntax correctness

## Context

The Android app (`android/`) is a real Kotlin/Compose project with source code, tests, and build configs, but it's missing the Gradle wrapper executables (`gradlew`, `gradlew.bat`, `gradle-wrapper.jar`). This means:
- `make android-lint` silently skips
- `run-static-analyzers.sh` Android/detekt sections silently skip
- `run-changed.sh` doesn't detect `android/*` changes at all
- CI workflows have no Android steps

The app is presented as a shipped surface (referenced in README) but has zero CI coverage.

## Changes

### 1. Add Gradle wrapper files
- Run `gradle wrapper --gradle-version 8.11.1` inside `android/` to generate `gradlew`, `gradlew.bat`, and `gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar`
- The `gradle-wrapper.properties` already exists pointing to 8.11.1
- These files must be committed to the repo (standard practice)

### 2. Add `android/*` detection to `run-changed.sh`
- Add `android_changed=0` variable (line ~53)
- Add `android/*) android_changed=1 ;;` case in the detection loop (line ~59)
- Add Android checks block: run `make android-lint` when `android_changed=1` (advisory, not strict)

**File:** `scripts/ci/run-changed.sh`

### 3. Wire `android-lint` into the `lint` Makefile target
- Change `lint: api-lint web-lint` в†’ `lint: api-lint web-lint android-lint`
- Since `android-lint` already gracefully skips when gradlew is missing, this is safe

### 4. Add `android-test` Makefile target
- New target that runs `./gradlew :app:test` (JVM unit tests only вЂ” no emulator needed)
- Same graceful-skip pattern as `android-lint`

**File:** `Makefile`

### 5. Add Android CI job to `.github/workflows/ci.yml`
- New `android` job that runs on `ubuntu-latest`
- Uses `actions/setup-java@v4` with JDK 17
- Caches Gradle home (`~/.gradle/caches`, `~/.gradle/wrapper`)
- Runs: `make android-lint` and `make android-test`
- Runs after `standard` (parallel with `coverage` and `analyzers`) to avoid slowing the critical path
- No Android SDK setup needed вЂ” AGP downloads what it needs via `sdkmanager`

### 6. Update docs
- Add `make android-lint` and `make android-test` to the CLAUDE.md commands table
- Add Android prerequisites note to CLAUDE.md (JDK 17 for command-line builds)
- Verify `android/README.md` still matches (it references `./gradlew` which will now exist)

## Files to modify
- `android/gradlew` (new вЂ” generated)
- `android/gradlew.bat` (new вЂ” generated)
- `android/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar` (new вЂ” generated)
- `Makefile` вЂ” add `android-test`, wire `android-lint` into `lint`
- `scripts/ci/run-changed.sh` вЂ” add `android/*` detection
- `.github/workflows/ci.yml` вЂ” add `android` job
- `CLAUDE.md` вЂ” add Android targets to commands table

## Verification
1. Run `android/gradlew --version` to confirm wrapper works
2. Run `make android-lint` вЂ” should invoke Gradle (may fail without Android SDK locally, but should not silently skip)
3. Run `make android-test` вЂ” should invoke Gradle test task
4. Verify `run-changed.sh` detects android file changes
5. Review CI YAML for syntax correctness

## Flotsam Monorepo Makefile вЂ” delegates to component Makefiles
## Usage: make <target>

# Load .env if present вЂ” makes vars available to shell commands in recipes
-include .env

.PHONY: api-build api-run api-generate api-test api-test-unit api-test-tdd \
        api-lint api-security api-migrate-up api-migrate-down api-clean \
        web-install web-dev web-build web-lint web-clean web-test web-test-tdd web-schema-sync \
        ext-install ext-build ext-typecheck \
        android-lint \
        lint \
        dev dev-db-up dev-db-down \
        demo demo-manual demo-headless demo-api demo-install \
        test-quick test-standard test-full \
        ci-changed ci-full hooks-install \
        scan-secrets scan-deps \
        coverage \
        help

## api-build: Build all API binaries (flotsamd, flotsam-worker, flotsam)
api-build:
	$(MAKE) -C api build

## api-run: Run the API server (flotsamd)
api-run:
	$(MAKE) -C api run

## api-run-worker: Run the job worker (flotsam-worker --watch)
api-run-worker:
	$(MAKE) -C api run-worker

## api-generate: Run GraphQL code generation
api-generate:
	$(MAKE) -C api generate

## api-test: Run all API tests
api-test:
	$(MAKE) -C api test

## api-test-unit: Run API unit tests
api-test-unit:
	$(MAKE) -C api test-unit

## api-test-tdd: Run API tests with tdd-guard-go when installed
api-test-tdd:
	$(MAKE) -C api test-tdd

## api-lint: Run linter on the API
api-lint:
	$(MAKE) -C api lint

## api-migrate-up: Apply database migrations
api-migrate-up:
	$(MAKE) -C api migrate-up

## api-migrate-down: Roll back last database migration
api-migrate-down:
	$(MAKE) -C api migrate-down

## api-seed: Populate dev database with sample data
api-seed:
	$(MAKE) -C api seed

## api-dev-token: Mint a dev JWT for local testing
api-dev-token:
	$(MAKE) -C api dev-token

## api-security: Run Go security analyzers (gosec + govulncheck)
api-security:
	$(MAKE) -C api security

## api-clean: Remove API build artifacts
api-clean:
	$(MAKE) -C api clean

## web-install: Install web frontend dependencies
web-install:
	$(MAKE) -C web install

## web-dev: Start Vite dev server (port 8080, proxies /graphql в†’ :8081)
web-dev:
	$(MAKE) -C web dev

## web-build: Type-check and build web frontend for production
web-build:
	$(MAKE) -C web build

## web-lint: Run ESLint on web frontend
web-lint:
	$(MAKE) -C web lint

## web-clean: Remove web build artifacts and node_modules
web-clean:
	$(MAKE) -C web clean

## web-test: Run web unit tests
web-test:
	$(MAKE) -C web test

## web-test-tdd: Run web tests with TDD Guard reporter when configured
web-test-tdd:
	$(MAKE) -C web test-tdd

## web-schema-sync: Regenerate web/schema.graphql and graphql-env.d.ts from API SDL files
web-schema-sync:
	cat api/graph/schema/*.graphql > web/schema.graphql
	cd web && pnpm exec gql-tada generate-output --tsconfig tsconfig.app.json

## ext-install: Install Chrome extension dependencies
ext-install:
	cd chrome-extension && pnpm install

## ext-build: Build Chrome extension (esbuild)
ext-build:
	cd chrome-extension && pnpm run build

## ext-typecheck: Type-check Chrome extension TypeScript
ext-typecheck:
	cd chrome-extension && pnpm run typecheck

## android-lint: Run Android lint and detekt (skips if no Gradle wrapper)
android-lint:
	@if [ -x android/gradlew ]; then \
		cd android && ./gradlew :app:lint :app:detekt; \
	else \
		echo "android/gradlew not found вЂ” skipping Android lint"; \
	fi

## lint: Run all linters (Go + web)
lint: api-lint web-lint

## dev: Start full-stack dev environment (Docker PG + air + Vite) with hot reload
dev:
	bash scripts/dev.sh

## dev-db-up: Start standalone dev database (PG 16 + pgvector + MinIO on port 5433)
dev-db-up:
	docker compose -f compose/db.yml up -d --wait
	@echo ""
	@echo "Dev database starting on port 5433. Use:"
	@echo "  DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/flotsam?sslmode=disable"
	@echo ""
	@echo "MinIO console: http://localhost:9001 (minioadmin/minioadmin)"

## dev-db-down: Stop and remove the standalone dev database container
dev-db-down:
	docker compose -f compose/db.yml down

## demo: Run demo walkthrough (visible browser, auto mode)
demo:
	bash scripts/demo.sh auto

## demo-manual: Run demo walkthrough with manual pauses at each step
demo-manual:
	bash scripts/demo.sh manual

## demo-headless: Run demo walkthrough headless (CI-friendly, exits non-zero on failure)
demo-headless:
	bash scripts/demo.sh headless

## demo-api: Run headless GraphQL CRUD walkthrough (no browser needed)
demo-api:
	bash scripts/demo-api.sh

## demo-install: Install demo dependencies and Playwright browsers
demo-install:
	cd demo && pnpm install && pnpm exec playwright install --with-deps chromium

## test-quick: Fast checks вЂ” Go unit tests, TS type-check + build, ESLint (~10-20s, no DB)
test-quick: api-test-unit web-build web-lint

## test-standard: Full local validation вЂ” quick + web unit tests + Go lint + ext typecheck (~30-60s, no DB)
test-standard: test-quick web-test api-lint ext-typecheck

## test-full: Complete validation вЂ” standard + integration tests (requires DB + running services)
test-full: test-standard api-test

## coverage: Run coverage checks for Go and web
coverage:
	bash scripts/ci/check-coverage.sh

## ci-changed: Run risk-aware checks on changed files (vs origin/main)
ci-changed:
	bash scripts/ci/run-changed.sh

## ci-full: Run full-repo policy and analyzer checks
ci-full:
	bash scripts/ci/run-full.sh

## scan-secrets: Run gitleaks secret scanning on the repo
scan-secrets:
	@if command -v gitleaks &>/dev/null; then \
		gitleaks detect --source . --no-banner; \
	else \
		echo "gitleaks not installed вЂ” see docs/ci/scanning.md"; \
	fi

## scan-deps: Run osv-scanner dependency vulnerability scanning
scan-deps:
	@if command -v osv-scanner &>/dev/null; then \
		osv-scanner scan --lockfile=api/go.sum --lockfile=web/pnpm-lock.yaml; \
	else \
		echo "osv-scanner not installed вЂ” see docs/ci/scanning.md"; \
	fi

## hooks-install: Configure git to use .githooks/ for pre-commit and pre-push
hooks-install:
	bash scripts/install-hooks.sh

## help: List all available targets
help:
	@echo ""
	@echo "Usage: make <target>"
	@echo ""
	@grep -hE '^## [a-z]' $(MAKEFILE_LIST) | sed 's/## //' | sort -t: -k1,1 | \
		while IFS=: read -r target desc; do \
			printf "  %-24s %s\n" "$$target" "$$desc"; \
		done

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Run risk-aware checks on changed files.
# Usage:
#   run-changed.sh           # diff against origin/main
#   run-changed.sh --staged  # staged changes only (pre-commit hook)
#
# Environment:
#   FLOTSAM_STRICT=1  вЂ” exit non-zero on any failure (default: advisory)
set -euo pipefail

repo_root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
cd "$repo_root"

STRICT="${FLOTSAM_STRICT:-0}"
EXIT_CODE=0
STAGED=0

if [[ "${1:-}" == "--staged" ]]; then
    STAGED=1
    DETECT_ARGS=(--staged)
else
    DETECT_ARGS=()
fi

# --- Step 1: Risk classification ---
echo "=== Risk Classification ==="
if ! python3 scripts/ci/detect-risk.py "${DETECT_ARGS[@]}" --severity-threshold critical; then
    echo ""
    echo "CRITICAL risk detected вЂ” manual review required."
    if [[ "$STRICT" == "1" ]]; then
        EXIT_CODE=1
    fi
fi
echo ""

# --- Step 2: Determine what changed ---
if [[ "$STAGED" == "1" ]]; then
    changed=$(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR)
else
    merge_base=$(git merge-base HEAD origin/main 2>/dev/null || echo "HEAD")
    changed=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR "${merge_base}...HEAD" 2>/dev/null || true)
fi

if [[ -z "$changed" ]]; then
    echo "No changed files detected."
    exit 0
fi

go_changed=0
web_changed=0
ext_changed=0
docs_changed=0

while IFS= read -r file; do
    case "$file" in
        api/*) go_changed=1 ;;
        web/*) web_changed=1 ;;
        chrome-extension/*) ext_changed=1 ;;
        README.md|AGENTS.md|CLAUDE.md|api/CLAUDE.md|web/CLAUDE.md|docs/*|Makefile) docs_changed=1 ;;
    esac
done <<< "$changed"

# --- Step 3: Run targeted checks ---
if [[ "$go_changed" == "1" ]]; then
    echo "=== Go Checks ==="
    if ! make api-test-unit; then
        echo "Go unit tests FAILED"
        EXIT_CODE=1
    fi
    if ! make api-lint; then
        echo "Go lint FAILED"
        EXIT_CODE=1
    fi
    echo "--- Go security analyzers (advisory) ---"
    if ! make api-security; then
        echo "Security analyzers reported findings"
        if [[ "$STRICT" == "1" ]]; then
            EXIT_CODE=1
        fi
    fi
    echo ""
fi

if [[ "$web_changed" == "1" ]]; then
    echo "=== Web Checks ==="
    if ! make web-build; then
        echo "Web build FAILED"
        EXIT_CODE=1
    fi
    if ! make web-lint; then
        echo "Web lint FAILED"
        EXIT_CODE=1
    fi
    echo ""
fi

if [[ "$ext_changed" == "1" ]]; then
    echo "=== Chrome Extension Checks ==="
    if ! make ext-install; then
        echo "Extension install FAILED"
        EXIT_CODE=1
    fi
    if ! make ext-typecheck; then
        echo "Extension typecheck FAILED"
        EXIT_CODE=1
    fi
    if ! make ext-build; then
        echo "Extension build FAILED"
        EXIT_CODE=1
    fi
    echo ""
fi

if [[ "$docs_changed" == "1" ]]; then
    echo "=== Doc Checks ==="
    if ! bash scripts/ci/check-doc-commands.sh; then
        echo "Doc command audit found mismatches"
        if [[ "$STRICT" == "1" ]]; then
            EXIT_CODE=1
        fi
    fi
    if ! python3 scripts/ci/check-placeholders.py; then
        echo "Placeholder check found mismatches"
        if [[ "$STRICT" == "1" ]]; then
            EXIT_CODE=1
        fi
    fi
    echo ""
fi

# --- Step 4: Summary ---
if [[ "$EXIT_CODE" != "0" ]]; then
    if [[ "$STRICT" == "1" ]]; then
        echo "FAILED вЂ” strict mode, exiting with error."
    else
        echo "Issues found (advisory mode вЂ” not blocking)."
        EXIT_CODE=0
    fi
else
    echo "All checks passed."
fi

exit "$EXIT_CODE"

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

env:
  GO_VERSION: "1.24"
  NODE_VERSION: "22"
  PNPM_VERSION: "9"
  FLOTSAM_STRICT: "1"
  FLOTSAM_RUN_QUALITY_GATES: "1"

jobs:
  changed:
    name: Risk-aware changed checks
    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: ${{ env.GO_VERSION }}

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: ${{ env.PNPM_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache pnpm store
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.local/share/pnpm/store
          key: pnpm-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('web/pnpm-lock.yaml', 'chrome-extension/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: pnpm-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Install web dependencies
        run: make web-install

      - name: Install extension dependencies
        run: make ext-install

      - name: Run changed-file checks
        run: make ci-changed

  standard:
    name: Standard checks
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: ${{ env.GO_VERSION }}

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: ${{ env.PNPM_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache pnpm store
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.local/share/pnpm/store
          key: pnpm-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('web/pnpm-lock.yaml', 'chrome-extension/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: pnpm-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Install web dependencies
        run: make web-install

      - name: Install extension dependencies
        run: make ext-install

      - name: Run test-standard
        run: make test-standard

  coverage:
    name: Coverage
    needs: standard
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: ${{ env.GO_VERSION }}

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: ${{ env.PNPM_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache pnpm store
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.local/share/pnpm/store
          key: pnpm-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('web/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: pnpm-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Install web dependencies
        run: make web-install

      - name: Run coverage checks
        run: make coverage

      - name: Upload coverage reports
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-reports
          path: |
            api/coverage/
            web/coverage/
          retention-days: 14

  analyzers:
    name: Static analyzers
    needs: standard
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: ${{ env.GO_VERSION }}

      - name: Install analyzers
        run: |
          go install github.com/securego/gosec/v2/cmd/gosec@latest
          go install golang.org/x/vuln/cmd/govulncheck@latest
          curl -sSfL https://github.com/gitleaks/gitleaks/releases/latest/download/gitleaks_8.21.2_linux_x64.tar.gz \
            | tar -xz -C /usr/local/bin gitleaks

      - name: Run static analyzers
        run: bash scripts/ci/run-static-analyzers.sh

      - name: Upload analyzer output
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: analyzer-reports
          path: |
            api/gosec-report.*
            api/govulncheck-report.*
          retention-days: 14

# Flotsam вЂ” Claude Instructions

Personal knowledge management system: a monorepo with a Go API (`api/`) and a
React/TypeScript frontend (`web/`). Component-specific deep-dives are in the
`@import` files below.

---

## Prerequisites

- **Go** 1.24+
- **Node.js** 22+ with **pnpm** 9+ (`npm install -g pnpm`)
- **Docker** (for `make dev` вЂ” runs PostgreSQL + pgvector + MinIO in containers)
- **PostgreSQL** 16+ with pgvector (only if managing DB manually instead of `make dev`)
- **golangci-lint** (optional): see golangci-lint docs

---

## Environment setup

```bash
cp .env.example .env   # fill in DATABASE_URL and JWT_SECRET at minimum
```

Required: `DATABASE_URL` вЂ” the API refuses to start without it.

Ports:
- **API**: `:8081`
- **Web dev server**: `:8080` вЂ” proxies `/graphql`, `/api`, and `/mcp` в†’ `localhost:8081`

---

## Commands (Root Makefile)

| Command | Action |
